svg.title: Lean Layer-1 tokens cooked into rich Layer-2 tokens
svg.desc: rustc_lexer's lean ~42-variant TokenKind (single-char operators, undistinguished Ident, suffix-blind Literal) is transformed by Layer 2 into the richer ~62-variant rustc_ast token: operators get glued, identifiers become interned-Symbol Idents, and literals are cooked.
